name: blog-finmoovi
description: Blog FinMoovi - Portal de Finanças Pessoais

scripts.build: npm run validate:i18n && npm run generate && astro build
scripts.generate: node --import tsx scripts/generate-brand-css.js && node --import tsx scripts/generate-functions-config.js && node --import tsx scripts/generate-manifest.js && node --import tsx scripts/generate-i18n-client.js
